dataset_name: Cortex Air Mode - Block I Route, Schedule and Tracking Readiness
purpose: Mock/reference route feasibility, schedule input, tracking milestone, and route risk dataset for Cortex air-mode R&D readiness checks.
legal_note: R&D/mock reference only. It does not provide live schedules, live capacity, booking confirmation, or real AWB tracking. Use live carrier/forwarder/schedule/tracking APIs before operational use.
integration_note: Run Block I after Blocks A-H. It turns the previous readiness checks into route-level readiness: direct/transit route, carrier per leg, aircraft per leg, transit capability, security/PLACI, booking status, capacity status and tracking milestones.
recommended_next_research: Live schedule/capacity APIs: CargoAi, WebCargo, OAG, Cirium, SITA, carrier APIs
AWB tracking APIs from carriers or aggregators
Lane-specific minimum connection times for cargo
Temperature-controlled transit dwell-time and active container runtime monitoring
